name: has_dedicated_connection
full_help:
has_dedicated_connection

Description: 
checks dedicated connectivity 

Syntax: 
has_dedicated_connection  [-of_objects <args>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-of_objects]  Accepts only boundary pins of an instance as input
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories:

arguments.description: Accepts only boundary pins of an instance as input
Suspend message limits during command execution
